## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Why This Change

Explain the problem solved or the improvement made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] UI improvement

## Testing

List the checks you ran.

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Screenshots

If the UI changed, attach screenshots or a short recording.

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes are focused and limited in scope
- [ ] I reviewed my code before submitting
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I included testing notes
